name: o-tiling
description: A standalone, high-performance auto-tiling engine for GNOME Shell.
author: oliwebd

scripts.test: pnpm run lint && pnpm run build && mkdir -p ~/.local/share/gnome-shell/extensions/o-tiling@oliwebd.github.com && cp -rv dist/* ~/.local/share/gnome-shell/extensions/o-tiling@oliwebd.github.com
